ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., person, organization) */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the link belongs to */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., friendship, collaboration) */,
  "link_weight" REAL /* Weight of the link (e.g., strength of the relationship) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exploration_history" (
  "exploration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exploration event */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being explored */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number in the exploration process */,
  "pct_nodes_explored" REAL /* Percentage of nodes explored so far */,
  "pct_links_explored" REAL /* Percentage of links explored so far */,
  "abs_nodes_explored" INTEGER /* Absolute number of nodes explored so far */,
  "abs_links_explored" INTEGER /* Absolute number of links explored so far */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exploration event occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exploration event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exploration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exploration_history_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_novelty_scores" (
  "novelty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each novelty score */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the node belongs to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number when the novelty score was calculated */,
  "novelty_score" REAL /* Novelty score of the node (between 0 and 1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the novelty score was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the novelty score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("novelty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_novelty_scores_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_novelty_scores_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_novelty_scores" (
  "novelty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each novelty score */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the link belongs to */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the link */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number when the novelty score was calculated */,
  "novelty_score" REAL /* Novelty score of the link (between 0 and 1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the novelty score was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the novelty score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("novelty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_novelty_scores_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_novelty_scores_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the network */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_user_access_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)
